personal.name: Gerardo Lucero
personal.title: Technical Product Manager | Solutions Architect
personal.summary: Over 7 years building distributed systems with Kafka on Kubernetes, implementing CI/CD pipelines in AWS and GCP, and ensuring end-to-end observability. Experienced in technical leadership across multiple teams, standardization of pipelines, and design of event-driven and hexagonal architectures. Focused on performance, reliability, and incremental delivery. Passionate about mentoring, cloud transformation, and technical excellence.

experience.title: DevSecOps Engineer
experience.description: Implemented secure CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions with SAST, DAST, quality gates, code coverage, and policy-as-code to ensure regulatory compliance. Built reusable libraries for multi-platform deployments across Kubernetes, Cloud Run, and on-premise environments. Applied container hardening, secret management, and dependency scanning, while defining 'golden paths' with templates, linters, and conventions that reduced defects and accelerated delivery times.
highlights: Secure CI/CD pipelines with SAST, DAST, quality gates and policy-as-code
Reusable deployment libraries for Kubernetes, Cloud Run and on-premise
Container hardening, secret management and dependency scanning
Golden path templates reducing defects and accelerating delivery

experience.title: Solutions Architect
experience.description: Design and implement cloud-native solutions on AWS using ECS and Lambda, prioritizing scalability, resilience, and security. Built an Internal Developer Platform (IDP) for Kubernetes supporting multiple deployment stacks, enabling teams to self-serve infrastructure consistently. Implemented Karpenter for dynamic worker node optimization and Jenkins-based pipelines for standardized delivery. Proposed and led architecture initiatives including a generic batch orchestration framework with Feature Store integration and a centralized authentication layer. Strengthened observability through Dynatrace and drive the OpenShift transition strategy aligned with business roadmaps.
highlights: Internal Developer Platform (IDP) on Kubernetes — multi-stack deployments, golden paths and self-service infrastructure for engineering teams
Karpenter + Jenkins: dynamic worker node scaling and standardized CI/CD pipelines
Batch orchestration architecture with Feature Store integration for ML workloads
Centralized authentication layer — unified identity and access control across services
Dynatrace observability with SLO/SLI definition and distributed tracing across teams
OpenShift transition strategy aligned with product and business roadmaps

experience.title: Solutions Architect / Tech Lead Product
experience.description: Led and managed end-to-end technology projects, coordinating multi-disciplinary teams to ensure successful delivery of scalable solutions. Oversaw the implementation of platforms across both on-premise and cloud environments, standardizing architecture and deployment practices.
highlights: End-to-end technology project leadership across multiple squads
Platform implementation across on-premise and cloud environments
Architecture and deployment standardization

experience.title: Technical Product Manager
experience.description: Directed the development of a state-machine-based digital credit storage component used across three business units, significantly improving request processing times. Managed the full lifecycle of digital payments including Oxxo, cards, direct debits and third-party integrations. Led the creation of a fully digital mobile sales application built on Kafka and Kubernetes for mission-critical scalability.
highlights: State-machine credit component deployed across 3 Grupo Findep companies
Full digital payments lifecycle: Oxxo, cards, direct debits, third parties
Fully digital mobile sales app from concept to production
Kafka + Kubernetes for mission-critical financial operations

experience.title: Tech Lead Engineer
experience.description: Developed and implemented a web-based car rental system that optimized payment and booking workflows. Led the design and development of a real-time reservation system enabling dynamic pricing and availability management, ensuring an efficient and user-friendly experience.
highlights: Web-based car rental system with optimized payment workflows
Real-time reservation system with dynamic pricing
Full-stack development and team leadership
